title: GIEE des 3 Vallées
subtitle: Présentation de la journée Sols Vivants Tous Gagnants
description: A presentation of the GIEE des 3 Vallées detailing their objectives and actions since 2016 to promote agroecological practices. It also outlines the programme and organisation of the “Sols Vivants Tous Gagnants” event, including experimental platforms, trainings, and thematic workshops.
